tasks.prompt: Read /home/a/aiasm-v0.1/update-state. If UPDATE=0, read /home/a/aiasm-v0.1/prompt and execute all instructions in it. The prompt instructions end with setting UPDATE to 1 after completion. If UPDATE is not 0, report back "UPDATE is not 0, skipping."
检查/home/a/aiasm-v0.1/update-state文件中的UPDATE值，如果UPDATE=1则继续操作系统开发任务：按汇编底层（含WASM运行时）、WASM中间解释层、应用层的结构开发，每步qemu调试通过后发布release并推送。
